name: Antisocial Behavior Assessment
description: Evaluates social withdrawal, isolation, and social interaction difficulties

questions.text: Do you often feel uncomfortable in social situations?
Do you prefer to spend time alone rather than with others?
Do you avoid social gatherings when possible?
Do you have difficulty making new friends?
Do you feel anxious when meeting new people?
Do you often feel like you don't fit in with groups?
Do you find it hard to maintain close relationships?

terminationRules.name: Early Social Screening
terminationRules.description: Skip remaining questions if no initial social concerns
